name: cold_day_occupancy_away
description: Cold day. User starts home with heat running at comfort_heat=70F. At 09:00 user leaves (occupancy_away) — P3 comfort band arms [setback_heat=60 / setback_cool=82] with active=ceiling. Classification cycles at 11:00 and 13:00 while away reapply band. User returns at 17:00 → comfort restored to 70F.
notes: Tests cold day + full occupancy cycle: home → away (P3 dual band) → classification cycles → home (comfort restored).
P3 migration (Issue #249): select_comfort_band(away) always uses active='ceiling' regardless of day type.
Primary temperature = ceiling=82F (setback_cool). Floor=60F guards against excessive cooling.
NOTE: expect_temp updated from 60F (old setback_heat) to 82F (P3 band ceiling=setback_cool).
This is a gap-filling scenario covering cold-day away occupancy path.

events.note: Cold winter morning. Indoor at comfort_heat=70F. User home.
User leaves. Occupancy transitions to 'away'. Heat setback fires: setback_heat=60F (cold day, heat mode).
30-min classification cycle while away. Occupancy=away → simulator calls _handle_occupancy_away() → reapplies setback_heat=60F.
Another classification cycle while away. Same result: setback_heat maintained at 60F.
User returns home. Occupancy transitions to 'home'. Comfort restored to comfort_heat=70F.

assertions.reason: Cold-day classification applied while home: hvac_mode=heat, target=comfort_heat=70F.
P3: user leaves → occupancy_away. Away band armed [floor=60/ceiling=82, active=ceiling]. Primary temperature=ceiling=82F (setback_cool). Floor=60F guards against over-cooling.
P3: classification cycle while away reapplies away band ceiling=82F. Comfort NOT restored.
P3: second classification cycle while away. Band ceiling=82F maintained.
User returns home → occupancy_home. Classification is heat mode → restore to comfort_heat=70F.

verdict.summary: P3: cold-day away setback arms dual band [60/82] ceiling=setback_cool; classification cycles maintain band; comfort restored on return
verdict.observed_behavior: classification_applied (heat, 70F) → setback_applied (ceiling=82F, away band) × 3 → comfort_restored (70F, home)
verdict.expected_behavior: P3 away band [floor=60/ceiling=82] active=ceiling. Occupant returns to home that was never too hot (>82F) nor over-cooled (<60F).
